Journal Article · Chemistry of Materials, 31, 774-784

Hydrogenated Titanium Oxide Decorated Upconversion Nanoparticles: Facile Laser Modified Synthesis and 808 nm NIR Light Triggered Phototherapy

Zhiyao Hou, Kerong Deng, Meifang Wang, Yihan Liu, Mengyu Chang, Shanshan Huang, Chunxia Li*, Yi Wei, Ziyong Cheng, Gang Han, Abdulaziz A. Al Kheraif, and Jun Lin*

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

Hydrogenated titanium oxide-decorated upconversion nanoparticles prepared by laser-modified synthesis for 808 nm NIR-triggered phototherapy.

Highlights

  • Uses laser-modified synthesis of decorated upconversion nanoparticles.
  • Supports 808 nm NIR light-triggered phototherapy.

Add synthesis workflow and phototherapy response details here.

Citation

Zhiyao Hou et al. Hydrogenated Titanium Oxide Decorated Upconversion Nanoparticles. Chem. Mater. 2019, 31, 774-784.
